3061940.name: L'Artisan Meurtrier
3061940.description:
L'Artisan Meurtrier is an old-school action-RPG built around a rich and demanding combat system. Take on fearsome enemies and thwart the most vicious traps in this varied and unforgiving universe.

Help the famous bounty hunter realize his most cherished wish: to return the Crossroads to its former glory! Rehabilitate old stores, unlock new buildings, participate in the reconstruction and evolution of this majestic city by growing your fame.

Technical and brutal combat: Live up to your reputation and use the full range of moves at your disposal to bring down your opponents!

Bloody executions: L'Artisan Meurtrier is a killer with a sense of panache. Revel in the blood of your victims, thanks to the increasingly bloody kill animations!

Memorable bosses: Prepare to take on the worst scoundrels and creatures in epic battles.

Mysteries and secrets to be revealed: The world of the Crossroads is vast, rich and enigmatic - will you take the time to explore every corner ?

Colorful characters and humorous dialogues serve a story full of twists and turns that follows the plot of the original work!
